notes: Source of truth for build progress. Each feature is end-to-end-testable against real data and the real validators. Flip passes:true ONLY after it genuinely passes; never weaken a test to pass. Validated on the 1-2k sample throughout; the full 100k run is deferred to the end.

features.description: parse_record(raw)->canonical struct: pure, reusable (Sandbox parity), separate from the writer
steps: assert all schema fields present and typed

features.description: candidates.parquet nested list<struct>+map table, source row order, lossless round-trip
steps: reload and compare to source JSON for byte/semantic equality
assert row i == i-th source line

features.description: candidate_ids.npy int32 [N], 7-digit part, authoritative alignment key
steps: assert dtype int32 and length N
assert matches parquet ids in order

features.description: streaming write is memory-frugal (one RecordBatch resident), ~5-10k/batch, Zstd, pinned Arrow schema
steps: measure peak RSS over sample ingest

features.description: integrity: exactly-N rows, candidate_id unique and ^CAND_[0-9]{7}$, quarantine-not-drop policy
steps: inject a malformed line and assert quarantine+count, not crash

features.description: ingest_manifest.json (rows, quarantine, source+output sha256, schema fp, versions, git, timestamp)
steps: assert all fields present and hashes match files

features.description: jd_query.json typed-criteria catalog + lexical groups+synonyms + ideal narrative + anti-profile narratives+ordered labels + divergence decl
steps: assert 5 must-haves, nice-to-haves, disqualifiers incl consulting hard gate, modifiers, atomic engagement signals

features.description: jd_ideal.npy [1x384] f32 L2-norm via query prefix
jd_antiprofile.npy [Ax384] f32 L2-norm, row order == declared label order
steps: assert row order matches jd_query labels

features.description: build-time validation: schema well-formed, every evidence_sources path exists in candidate_schema.json, unique ids, valid enums
steps: assert every evidence path resolves in candidate_schema.json

features.description: jd_manifest.json (sha256 each file, model+revision, dim, normalize, prefix, git, timestamp)
builder(candidate, frozen_inputs) reusable per-candidate derivation (REF_DATE, jd vectors, company_table, concept_registry, model frozen)
steps: assert pool-independent given frozen inputs (skips REF_DATE pre-scan)

features.description: embeddings_identity.npy + embeddings_evidence.npy [Nx384] f32 L2-norm, passage prefix, query-aware evidence-doc assembly
steps: assert shapes, unit norm, deterministic assembly order

features.description: features.npy [NxF] raw + features.parquet + feature_manifest.json (G1-G10 + 23 signals + corroboration channels)
steps: assert F matches manifest and all groups present

features.description: NaN+_present invariant: _present==0 <=> value is NaN; no sentinels, no imputation
steps: assert NaN pattern matches present flags across all nullable cols

features.description: bm25_index/ CSR npz + idf.npy + doclen.npy + vocab.json; narrative-only corpus (skills[] excluded); controlled phrase-joining
normalization_stats.json per-feature full-pool percentiles {count,missing,min,max,mean,std,p1..p99}
evidence_snippets row-addressable sidecar (offsets+blob) with stable evidence_id; O(100) random access
steps: materialize 100 random rows without full load

features.description: REF_DATE = max(last_active_date in pool)+1 day, frozen in manifest, never today()/build-time
steps: assert frozen in manifest and used pool-wide

features.description: alignment: row i aligns across both embeddings, features, candidate_ids, parquet; repr_manifest.json + loud-fail assertion
steps: assert candidate_ids match Goal 1 and length N

features.description: 4A retrieval: recall-first union shortlist (dense_evidence U dense_identity U BM25 U structural_prefilter), membership only
steps: assert every planted Tier-5 fixture is included

features.description: 4B criterion eval: per-criterion satisfaction + evidence trail via trust-tiered noisy-OR x soft corroboration gate; feature transforms on frozen stats
4C fusion: structured = MH_softAND x (1+NH_bonus) x CM_modifier (criterion-satisfaction spine)
steps: assert high dense cosine alone cannot inflate fit

features.description: 4D calibration: tail-anchored calibrated fit_score + fit_tier {Elite,Strong,Plausible,Filler}
steps: assert irrelevant median maps near 0 not 0.5

features.description: 4E modifiers: engagement_modifier in [0.7,1.1] + risk_modifier in [0.5,1.0], bounded, applied in Goal 6
steps: assert low-fit x high-engagement stays low (HR-Manager trap)

features.description: fit bundle (contracts C7): fit_score, subscores, per-criterion satisfaction+fit_contribution, evidence trail (evidence_id/source_tier/jd_label), fit_tier, corroboration-breadth count
pool distribution stats (BM25/dense_identity/dense_evidence[/CE]) emitted offline for shortlist-independent calibration
risk_flags(features) reusable; H1 yoe-tenure>2, H2 tenure-yoe>2, H3 >=2 expert/adv skills with duration 0; OR-fired
steps: assert OR firing and per-rule evidence persisted

features.description: honeypot detection invariants: rule=>condition; no candidate in the empty (0.5,2.0] yoe-tenure gap
consulting_entire_career hard gate + any_product_stint override + suppression_evidence
steps: assert override on product-stint fixture with suppression_evidence

features.description: stuffer_suspect_flag diagnostic (runtime; high lexical-dense divergence + zero Tier-1/2 + title/domain mismatch), audit-only never excludes
risk_flags artifact aligned by row order + risk_manifest.json
eligibility: hard_gate_flag = honeypot OR (consulting AND NOT suppressed), derived not persisted; score everyone, select eligible
steps: assert selection restricted to eligible subset

features.description: final_score = fit x engagement x risk; printed = final_score - rank*delta micro-term; ONLY printed-score tie-break = candidate_id ascending
steps: assert printed strictly decreasing with rank
assert equal-score rows ordered candidate_id ascending

features.description: top-100 has zero honeypot_flag and zero hard_gate; honeypot exposure comfortably <<10%
steps: assert zero detected honeypots in top-100

features.description: submission.csv columns exactly candidate_id,rank,score,reasoning; exactly 100 rows; validate_submission.py passes
steps: run validate_submission.py and assert 'Submission is valid.'

features.description: fill exactly 100 with best-available eligibles; filler_flag == fit_tier==Filler
steps: assert exactly 100 rows even when relevant < 100

features.description: selection_manifest.json: counts, eligible, excluded, exclusions-by-reason, top-excluded, config hash, git, timestamp

11-point internal validation suite (finite, rank-order consistency, eligibility-vs-primitives, top-100 correctness, alignment, tie-break audit, reasoning checks, CSV round-trip, top-excluded, provenance)
deterministic evidence->narrative compiler (7A planner role-tags/orders IR; 7B realizer rank-band-toned slot grammar); pure projection of decided evidence
steps: assert never reads raw candidate data / selects evidence

features.description: citeable whitelist enforced; raw skills[] array NEVER cited; every cited token resolves to an evidence_id
steps: assert zero; assert named skills come only from assessment set

features.description: rank-tone consistency: top candidates carry positive evidence; fillers carry >=1 limitation
steps: assert filler rows acknowledge a limitation

features.description: reasoning non-empty, unique, <=~240 chars, QUOTE_ALL CSV, UTF-8, newlines collapsed
steps: assert uniqueness + length + QUOTE_ALL on output

features.description: reasoning_provenance.json (clause->evidence_id) + reasoning_audit_report.json
steps: assert every clause bound to an evidence_id

features.description: two-command repro: precompute.py --candidates ... (unbudgeted) -> rank.py --candidates candidates.jsonl --out submission.csv (budgeted)
steps: assert rank.py is the single CSV-producing command

features.description: ranking step CPU-only, no-network, <=5 min wall-clock, <=16 GB RAM, <=5 GB disk (measured)
steps: assert within budget on sample and (deferred) full pool

features.description: Runtime ML Policy: rank.py instantiates/loads/executes NO neural model or inference engine
steps: static + import check that no torch/transformers/onnx model is loaded at runtime

features.description: two-phase load: validate small artifacts + alignment + artifact<->pool hash binding BEFORE big matrices (fail in ~100ms)
steps: assert loud fail before matrix load

features.description: build_manifest.json SOLE root: hash chain + all sub-manifests + runtime_report + submission_sha256 + git + lib_versions + model_revision + thread_settings
steps: assert it references every sub-manifest by path

features.description: determinism: PYTHONHASHSEED=0, single-thread BLAS, stable hashing, no clocks/RNG; two rank.py runs -> byte-identical CSV
runtime_report.json per-stage timings + peak RSS + bytes loaded + cold/thread flags, emitted every run
Sandbox Runtime: runs Goal 1->3->5 builders on a <=100 sample using shipped frozen pool-stats (never recomputed)
steps: assert frozen stats applied, not recomputed

features.description: README (single repro command), requirements.runtime.txt + requirements.precompute.txt (pinned), submission_metadata.yaml, Dockerfile.runtime + docker run recipe
steps: assert README has the exact reproduce command

features.description: canonical keyword-stuffer (AI skills + wrong title, no corroboration) ranked DOWN / out of top-100
steps: assert it does not enter top-10/top-100

features.description: plain-language Tier-5 (built rec/search system at product co, no buzzwords) ranked UP
steps: assert it ranks into the relevant tier

features.description: each honeypot archetype (H1/H2/H3) excluded from top-100
behavioral down-weight: inactive/low-response perfect-on-paper candidate down-weighted vs an active equivalent
